burn.title: Burn Tiles (Orange)
burn.body: Inflicts Burn on the enemy, dealing 15% of max HP at the end of the round. Lasts 1 turn. Stackable — each extra Burn tile adds another stack.

freeze.title: Freeze Tiles (Light Blue)
freeze.body: Inflicts Freeze on the enemy, slowing the timer by 15% for 10 seconds. A countdown timer appears next to the Freeze debuff icon. Stackable — each stack adds another 10s of slowing.

shield.title: Shield Tiles (Blue)
shield.body: Grants the player a shield worth 15% of max HP at the end of the turn. A white bar above the HP bar shows remaining shield. Non-stackable — only one shield active at a time.

poison.title: Poison Tiles (Purple)
poison.body: Inflicts Poison on the enemy, dealing 5% of max HP at the end of the round. Lasts 3 turns. Does not stack — reapplying refreshes the duration.

heal.title: Life Tiles (Green)
heal.body: Heals the player for 10% of max HP at the end of the turn. Stackable — multiple Life tiles in one turn each add a separate heal.

lightning.title: Lightning Tiles (Yellow)
lightning.body: Inflicts Shock on the enemy, dealing 10% of max HP at the end of the round. Lasts 2 rounds. Stackable — each extra tile adds a new Shock stack.

warp.title: Warped Tiles (Pink Swirl)
warp.body: Cursed tiles! Using a Warped tile deals 5% damage to you instead. All Warped tiles revert to normal next turn — endure or avoid them.

locked.title: Locked Tiles (Gold ✕)
locked.body: Tile is sealed! Click it to trigger a random FAQ challenge — answer correctly within 20 seconds to unlock. The game pauses during the challenge. Wrong answer = random debuff applied to you and the tile stays locked.

refresh.title: New Question
refresh.body: Skips the current word and loads a fresh question. Useful when you're stuck. 3 uses per battle.

boost.title: Rainbow Boost
boost.body: Transforms 3 random normal tiles into special tiles (fire, ice, heal, lightning, shield, or poison). Great for activating effects fast. 3 uses per battle.

time.title: Add Time
time.body: Adds 12 seconds back onto the round timer. Use it when you need a moment to think. 3 uses per battle.
